##NAMES=Aspirin
##RRUFFID=XD120019
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=
##LOCALITY=Synthetic; pill is from Traphaco
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=David Blake
##DESCRIPTION=Coated, white 100 mg tablets. Aspirin is used as an analgesic, an antipyretic, and to reduce inflammation. The data was collected on the coating of the pill, in this case its TiO2 anatase.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is not yet confirmed
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/XD120019
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
